testcase.name: testBeforeSuiteInjection[0](class test.inject.NativeInjectionTestSamples$BadBeforeSuiteSample, beforeSuite, Native Injection is NOT supported for @BeforeSuite annotated )
testBeforeSuiteInjection[1](class test.inject.NativeInjectionTestSamples$BadBeforeTestSample, beforeTest, Can inject only one of <ITestContext, XmlTest> into a @BeforeTest annotated )
testBeforeSuiteInjection[2](class test.inject.NativeInjectionTestSamples$BadBeforeClassSample, beforeClass, Can inject only one of <ITestContext, XmlTest> into a @BeforeClass annotated )

testBeforeSuiteInjection[3](class test.inject.NativeInjectionTestSamples$BadBeforeMethodSample, beforeMethod, Can inject only one of <ITestContext, XmlTest, Method, Object[], ITestResult> into a @BeforeMethod annotated )

testBeforeSuiteInjection[4](class test.inject.NativeInjectionTestSamples$BadAfterMethodSample, afterMethod, Can inject only one of <ITestContext, XmlTest, Method, Object[], ITestResult> into a @AfterMethod annotated )
